name: PARKERVISION INC
business: The company licenses its proprietary radio frequency (RF) technologies and enforces its intellectual property through patent litigation. It has five licensees, all resulting from patent enforcement actions, and its business plan primarily consists of patent licensing and infringement litigation.

exposures.sentence: We have designed and developed proprietary radio frequency (RF) technologies and integrated circuits based on those technologies, and we license our technologies to others for use in wireless communication products.

catalysts.event: CAFC granted expedited appeal in patent infringement action against Qualcomm
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the CAFC granted our motion for an expected appeal of district court decisions in our patent infringement action against Qualcomm in the Middle District of Florida (Orlando division).

catalysts.event: Patent enforcement trial against MediaTek postponed
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, our patent enforcement trial against MediaTek, scheduled to commence in the Western District of Texas, was postponed by the court pending updates to expert reports and related briefings by the parties.
